positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a soaring phoenix emerging from abstract geometric flames. The phoenix should be depicted with flowing, symmetrical lines and vibrant, gradient colors (orange, cyan, gold). The composition must be centered and vertically balanced, creating a powerful silhouette against a clean, stark background. Use a neo-art deco aesthetic mixed with modern vector graphics principles. Ensure the design has excellent separation and strong contrast, making it ideal for a repeatable apparel print. Isolated subject, clean edges, perfect symmetry, graphic design.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, messy, low resolution, bad anatomy, grain, logo, trademark, signature, extra limbs, dirty, oil painting, complex background, muted colors
